claim_boundary.current_claim: The micro-fixture exercises deterministic citation, metadata, quote, pin-cite, and proposition-review-boundary rows.
non_claims: No claim that Prethinker verifies proposition-level legal support.
No claim that Prethinker checks good-law status.
No claim that the legal lane is product-ready.
No claim-bearing result from sanctioned/hallucination filings until the clean-public baseline lands and independently sourced sanction fixtures pass deterministic resolver gates.

must_include: bare reporter citation without case-name metadata
quoted language immediately before a citation
fabricated quote on a real authority
real quote attached to the wrong authority
sanction-style reporter shape extraction without unsupported-reporter false blocks
fixture_classes.purpose: Known-answer adversarial legal-authority checks made from a controlled source/inventory pair.

must_include: public source URL or retained public source record
no answer-key or model-output contamination in oracle packet
promotion_gate: quote and pin checks source-backed where authority text is available
explicit abstention where authority text is unavailable
fixture_classes.purpose: Real public legal filings whose cited authorities are available for deterministic citation, metadata, quote, and pin checks.

must_include: original filing or quoted filing excerpt
source-only oracle separating citation existence from proposition support
promotion_gate: resolver/report contract already passing controlled adversarial mutations
all proposition-support rows remain review-required unless independently reviewed
fixture_classes.purpose: Known public examples of AI-fabricated legal citations, fabricated quotes, or citation misuse.
